input.headline: Why ‘walkaway wives’ are leading the charge in midlife divorce

raw.headline: Why ‘walkaway wives’ are leading the charge in midlife divorce

winner: A walk away wife walked into a bar and said, "I'll have what he's having." The bartender replied, "Ma'am, I think you might need a divorce lawyer instead!

candidates.text: Why are walkaway wives setting new pace records at local running clubs? Because they've found their second wind in midlife!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on 'second wind' and midlife divorce, but the connection to 'pace records' feels slightly forced and less specific to the headline topic."}

candidates.text: Why did the husband say "walk away" when his wife asked him for a dance? Because she was leading the charge in their midlife diva-rise!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke attempts wordplay with 'leading the charge' and 'midlife diva-rise,' but the pun is weak and forced. The setup and punchline lack clarity and natural flow, making it less funny and somewhat confusing."}

candidates.text: Why are 'runup husbands' causing a surge in midlife marriages? Because they can't resist the allure of a new walk-in closet!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks strong surprise and specificity. The pun on 'runup husbands' and 'walk-in closet' is weak and feels forced, reducing overall funniness."}

candidates.text: Why are 'walkaway wives' mastering the art of two-step divorce? Because they can't resist a little "side-stepping"!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'two-step' and 'side-stepping,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity in connecting to midlife divorce trends."}

candidates.text: A walk away wife walked into a bar and said, "I'll have what he's having." The bartender replied, "Ma'am, I think you might need a divorce lawyer instead!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the twist on 'I'll have what he's having,' but it lacks specificity and depth related to the headline topic. The humor is mild and could be more surprising or aligned with the subject matter."}
